name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-6
title: No error path defined for non-existent feature-name argument
description: SKILL.md Step 1 says 'read the feature's current spec' but defines no behavior if <feature-name> resolves to a non-existent feature directory (no spec.md found). The skill should either (a) surface a clear error and stop, or (b) treat a missing spec as an empty baseline and proceed to create one. Currently the behavior is undefined and depends on the LLM's judgment.
